metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for github.com/xgodev/boost, shipped from the github.com/xgodev/boost-claude repository.

plugins.name: golang-boost
plugins.description: Single-entry, grouped-index skill for github.com/xgodev/boost — skills/boost/SKILL.md lists 8 top-level contexts, each expanding into a group/domain file before reaching a per-component leaf, so only the small top-level index loads on every trigger. Pulls in xgodev/quality-gate for the pre-push comparative gate as a dependency.
